member.name: M:GTA.UI.Sprite.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Drawing.SizeF,System.Drawing.PointF,System.Drawing.Color,System.Single,System.Boolean)
member.summary:
Initializes a new instance of the
class used for drawing in game textures on the screen.

is stored (the *.ytd file).

inside the Texture dictionary.

Set the
on screen where to draw the
.

Set the
used to draw the
.

Set the rotation to draw the sprite, measured in degrees, see also
.

Position the
based on its center instead of top left corner, see also
.
